prompt: A depiction of gradient descent as a lone explorer descending a vast mountainous terrain, rendered in the style of Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Strong diagonal composition, flat color planes, muted indigo and earthy tones, visible woodgrain texture, minimal shading, stylized clouds, layered depth using foreground and background separation. The explorer follows a winding path downward through repeating ridges, each lower than the previous. No modern elements, no photorealism, no text, no labels.
tradition_approach: Flat color planes, bold outlines, diagonal composition, minimal shading, layered depth, and visible woodblock texture to reflect authentic ukiyo-e grammar while embedding descent structure.
